---
name: Bug report
about: Something is not working as expected
---

**Browser and OS**
e.g. Chrome 124 on Ubuntu 22.04

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Load map …
2. Drag blocks …
3. Click Run

**Expected behaviour**

**Actual behaviour**
Include any errors from DevTools console.

**Generated JS** (optional)
The generated code is logged to DevTools console when you click Run, labelled `--- Generated JS ---`.
